app.title: Cursor Project Starter
app.subtitle: React + Vite · Chakra UI · Zustand · React Query
section.tech.title: Core stack
section.tech.description: Everything you need to bootstrap an enterprise-ready front-end.
section.arch.title: Architecture
section.arch.description: The project follows Feature-Sliced Design with strict layer boundaries.
section.setup.title: Initial setup
section.setup.description: Use the instructions below to extend the starter without breaking conventions.
stack.ui: Chakra UI with full tree-shaking and theme tokens
stack.state: Zustand stores per feature for predictable state
stack.data: React Query + Axios for networking and caching
stack.i18n: react-intl hooks with JSON message catalogs
stack.style: SCSS modules + design tokens from Chakra
arch.layers: Layers: shared → entities → features → widgets → pages → app
arch.fsd: Keep side-effects and presentation separated, export only public API
setup.commands: pnpm dev · pnpm lint · pnpm format
